metadata.title: AI Image Generator | mogged Online Workspace
metadata.description: Use mogged as an AI image generator and image editor for text-to-image, image-to-image, photo editing, and picture refinement in one workspace.
metadata.keywords: image, image editor, image editor ai, ai image generator, ai image editor, ai photo editor, picture editor, online image editor, text-to-image, image-to-image, {{app_domain}}

page.title: AI Image Generator Free Online
page.description: mogged gives you one online image generator and image editor for text-to-image ideas, image-to-image edits, photo cleanup, and fast image exports.

generator.title: AI Image Generator Free Online
generator.description: Run text-to-image generation or image-to-image editing inside the mogged online image editor workspace.

form.prompt_placeholder: Example: A premium skincare bottle on wet black stone, soft rim lighting, restrained reflections, crisp texture, clean luxury editorial composition.
form.prompt_too_long: Prompt is too long, please delete some content
form.translation_no_change: Prompt already looks ready in English.
form.translation_stale: You changed the prompt while translation was running, so we kept your latest version.
form.copy_failed: Could not copy the prompt. Please copy it manually.
form.paste_failed: Clipboard access is unavailable. Please paste with your keyboard shortcut.
form.workflow_runtime_hint: These are the shared controls across both image workflows.
form.multi_fusion_hint: Blend up to 10 source images for reference fusion, style transfer, or product variations.
form.web_search_hint: Allow the provider to call web search for current information when supported.
form.web_search_guest_hint: Sign in to use web search with account credits.
form.source_images_placeholder: Up to {count} public image URLs, one per line
form.source_image_hint: We accept JPEG, PNG or WEBP formats up to 10MB.
form.source_images_hint: Max {count} images. We accept JPEG, PNG or WEBP formats up to 10MB each.
form.source_image_required: Please provide one source image for image-to-image.
form.image_url_invalid: Invalid image URL. Please use a direct https:// image link.
form.image_url_video: This link does not point to a usable image file. Use a direct image URL instead of a video or download page.
form.image_url_cloud_drive: Cloud-drive and social share links are blocked here. Upload the image or use a direct public image URL instead.
form.image_url_private: This image URL looks private or local. Use a public direct image URL instead.
form.image_url_too_many: Only one source image URL is allowed here.
form.image_url_too_many_single: Single Edit accepts only one source image URL.
form.image_url_too_many_multi: Multi Fusion accepts up to 10 source image URLs.
form.notifications_hint: Useful when provider queues are busy. We keep the current task switch separate from your future default.
form.notify_on_completion: Email me when this task is ready
form.notify_on_completion_hint: We send the prompt, task page link, and a direct download shortcut when the image is ready.
form.notify_on_completion_by_default: Use this for future tasks too
form.notify_on_completion_by_default_hint: Save this as your default so new tasks start with notifications already enabled.

nano_banana.name: Nano Banana
nano_banana.description: Google Nano Banana image model for fast text-to-image and single-image edits.

nano_banana_2.name: Nano Banana 2
nano_banana_2.description: Latest Nano Banana route for prompt generation and source-image refinement.

gpt_image_2.name: GPT Image 2
gpt_image_2.description: OpenAI image model route for precise prompt following and clean edits.

nano_banana_pro.name: Nano Banana Pro
nano_banana_pro.description: VIP Nano Banana route for higher-fidelity image-to-image generation.

seedream_4.name: SeeDream 4.0
seedream_4.description: Cost-efficient SeeDream route for quick drafts and simple image edits.

seedream_45.name: SeeDream 4.5
seedream_45.description: Newer SeeDream route for balanced speed, cost, and image quality.

seedream_5.name: SeeDream 5.0
seedream_5.description: SeeDream 5.0 Lite route for clean hosted image generation and edits.

flux_2_pro.name: Flux 2 Pro
flux_2_pro.description: Premium Flux 2 Pro route for high-fidelity image and text rendering.

flux_2_flex.name: Flux 2 Flex
flux_2_flex.description: Budget-friendly Flux 2 route for fast, cost-effective generation.

grok_imagine.name: Grok Imagine
grok_imagine.description: Grok imagine model route for creative text-to-image generation.

ideogram_v3.name: Ideogram V3
ideogram_v3.description: Ideogram route for high-quality text and typography in generated images.

ideogram_character.name: Ideogram Character
ideogram_character.description: Ideogram route for consistent character and portrait generation.

qwen_image.name: Qwen Image
qwen_image.description: Qwen image model route for multilingual text-to-image and edits.

z_image.name: Z Image
z_image.description: Z-Image route for quick, low-cost image drafts and edits.

generator.queue_notice_free: Free image jobs may wait {min}-{max} min depending on load. Paid users skip this queue.
generator.queue_notice_paid: Paid image jobs skip the free queue and start when provider capacity is available.
generator.sample_preview_description: A sample image stays here until you run your first generation.
generator.error_nsfw_blocked: This request was blocked by safety filters. Please try a safer prompt.
generator.error_input_validation: Generation failed: the provider rejected the request parameters. Please simplify the prompt or adjust the inputs.
generator.error_image_url_access: Source image could not be loaded. Make sure the URL is public, direct, and not expired.
generator.error_unknown: Generation failed due to a temporary network or service issue. Please try again.
generator.guest_generation_unavailable: Free guest image generation is temporarily unavailable. Please try again later or sign in to use account credits.
generator.guest_web_search_unavailable: Web search is a signed-in account feature. Sign in to use it with account credits.
generator.error_no_result: The provider returned no result. Please retry with a different prompt.
generator.task_submitted_detail: We refresh automatically when the result is ready. Higher-resolution image jobs can sit in queue longer.
generator.task_completion_notification_scheduled: We will email this task's prompt, task page link, and first download shortcut when the result is ready.
generator.activity_link_hint: You can view all your tasks anytime at

status.pending: Waiting for the job to start

generator.task_still_processing: Still processing on server. We keep polling, you can leave and check later.
generator.create_task_failed: Failed to create an image task
generator.insufficient_credits: Insufficient credits. Please top up to keep creating.
generator.guest_quota_exhausted: You used today's free guest credits.
generator.guest_quota_exhausted_hint: Sign in to continue with account credits.
generator.prompt_required: Please enter a prompt before generating.
generator.download_fetch_failed: Failed to fetch the media file
generator.recent_tasks_empty: Your recent generated images will appear here.
generator.recent_tasks_guest_empty: Generated guest images will appear here on this browser.
generator.guest_history_notice: Anonymous results are saved only in this browser. They will not sync into your account after sign-in, and clearing browser data or switching devices can remove them. Download anything important.
generator.guest_history_empty: Generated guest images will appear here on this browser.
generator.error_provider_unavailable: This generator is temporarily unavailable. Please try again in a few minutes.
generator.error_invalid_request: We couldn't submit this request. Check the prompt and inputs, then try again.
generator.error_rate_limited: Too many attempts in a short time. Please wait a moment and try again.
generator.error_request_failed: Generation could not be completed. Please try again.
generator.error_request_processing: This same request is already processing. Please wait a moment before trying again.
generator.error_reference_unsupported: This source input is not supported in the current workflow. Replace it and try again.
